name: the-librarian
description: The Librarian — durable memory + cross-harness handoffs for Claude Code, served by your own Librarian MCP server.

plugins.name: the-librarian
plugins.description: Durable memory for Claude Code: automatic transcript capture + recall-awareness hooks, a native-memory write-block, the MCP server config, and four slash commands (/handoff, /takeover, /learn, /toggle-private).
